name: Zingy Chili Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can 4 oz diced green chilies, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain tomatoes, removing as much juice as possible.
2. Mix with all other ingredients.
3. Allow to chill for several hours to blend flavors.
4. Serve with tortilla chips. Note - will keep for up to two weeks in the fridge if tightly covered.
